text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “NN” include information for each core and supplemental HRSN for which a 
beneficiary received navigation services. 

Navigation outcome variables with “ALL” in the name (i.e., NN_CORE_ALL_RSLVD_SW, 
NN_CORE_ALL_CNCTED_TO_CSP_SW, NN_CORE_ALL_OPTOUT_NVGTN_SW, 
NN_CORE_ALL_OUTRCH_ATMPT_FAIL_SW, NN_CORE_ALL_CSP_UNAVLBL_SW, and 
NN_CORE_ALL_OUTCM_UNK_SW) are mutually
